summary: Refined REQ-F-012/013/014 and US-012/US-013 to be implementation-testable: added explicit bash/fish rc-file selection rules, defined non-interactive (`--yes`) semantics and failure behavior when $SHELL is missing/unsupported, specified exact idempotency marker block sentinel lines, and operationalized the sudo boundary for privileged/non-writable bin dirs. IDs/anchors unchanged.
tests_run: Manual: verified tightened REQs and ACs are concrete pass/fail and consistent with existing traceability links
